description_long: This is a futuristic, heavily armored combat tactical vehicle with a wide, angular body and a digital camouflage pattern in shades of green, brown, and black. The vehicle features multiple visible weapon mounts, including forward-facing cannons and side-mounted missile pods, as well as what appear to be vertical takeoff and landing thrusters integrated into the wings. Its exterior is covered in thick, sloped armor plating, providing full-body protection and a robust, intimidating profile. The rear section includes large exhaust ports and additional armored panels, while the undercarriage is equipped with retractable landing gear. The cockpit is centrally located at the front, with a dark, reinforced canopy and advanced sensor arrays. This vehicle is designed for urban combat scenarios, offering both offensive and defensive capabilities.
description: A futuristic, heavily armored combat tactical vehicle with digital camouflage, multiple weapon mounts, and VTOL thrusters, designed for urban warfare.
description_view_0: Front view shows the angular cockpit, forward-facing cannons, and the wide, camouflaged wings with integrated thrusters.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the missile pods, sloped armor, and the vehicle's low, wide stance.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals large exhaust ports, rear armor plating, and the full span of the wings with thruster details.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing missile pods, landing gear, and the digital camouflage pattern.
attribute_weapon_mounts: Four visible weapon mounts: two forward-facing cannons under the cockpit, and two missile pods on each wing.
attribute_armor_plating: Full-body sloped armor plating, visibly thick and robust, covering all sides including wings and rear, with reinforced panels.
attribute_camouflage_pattern: Digital camouflage pattern in green, brown, and black, with pixelated shapes covering the entire exterior.
attribute_military_markings: A small rectangular insignia on the top rear section; no other visible numbers or symbols.
